name: keystone
description: A visible engineering control layer for repository-aware, spec-driven Copilot work.

scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:extension && pnpm run build:webview
scripts.test:extension: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:extension-tests && node scripts/run-extension-tests.mjs
scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build

keystone.indexing.onWorkspaceOpen.description: Start local intelligence reconciliation after the workspace opens.

keystone.indexing.onBranchChange.description: Refresh repository intelligence after a branch change.

keystone.indexing.maxFileSizeKb.description: Maximum file size considered during indexing.

keystone.indexing.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files considered in one repository index.

keystone.indexing.workerCount.description: Persistent intelligence worker count. Use 0 for the low-impact automatic default (two utility workers plus one semantic worker).

keystone.indexing.retainedGenerations.description: Number of complete local intelligence generations retained for recovery.

keystone.indexing.exclusions.description: Additional glob patterns excluded from repository intelligence.

keystone.context.maxEstimatedTokens.description: Soft token budget for one task context package.

keystone.context.includeTests.description: Include related tests when preparing context.

keystone.workflow.requireSpecApproval.description: Require explicit specification approval before implementation.

keystone.agents.profiles.description: Inert, schema-validated agent metadata. Configuration does not prove runtime availability.

keystone.agents.aliases.description: User aliases with an explicit aliasFor target. Aliases inherit only evidence-backed target availability.

keystone.agents.rules.description: Deterministic task-category/capability to agent mappings used only for rule-based or fixed-workflow selection.

keystone.validation.runBuild.description: Offer the detected build command during validation.

keystone.validation.runLint.description: Offer the detected lint command during validation.

keystone.validation.runTests.description: Offer the detected test command during validation.

keystone.persistence.workspaceSpecificat.description: Store specifications in the repository. Disabled keeps them in extension-managed workspace storage.

keystone.team.repositoryArtifactsEnabled.description: Allow explicit handoff export under .keystone/handoffs. Keystone never commits the artifact automatically.

keystone.logging.level.description: Minimum level written to the Keystone output channel.
